overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a character in white traversing a snowy mountain landscape at night under the aurora borealis. The camera follows the character past an ancient stone tower before continuing alone through a narrowing mountain pass.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain slope with ancient stone tower ruin

events.description: character in white cloak moves out of frame ahead
stone tower and marker post pass out of view to the right

agents.ego_description: following a character in white clothing up a snowy slope toward a stone tower structure

notable_agents.action: walking ahead up the snowy path wearing white cloak, moving away from camera

entered.detail: expansive snow field with visible footprints and trail
ancient cylindrical stone tower ruin with snow on top
wooden post with red banners fluttering in wind
snow-dusted rocky mountain slopes forming the valley walls
green and blue northern lights shimmering in the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character in white clothing up a snowy mountain slope. An ancient stone tower stands to the right with a wooden marker post nearby. The aurora borealis glows in the night sky above as the character walks ahead and eventually moves out of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow valley under aurora borealis

events.description: aurora borealis becomes more prominent and intense overhead

agents.ego_description: moving steadily forward through the open snowy valley with no other characters in sight

segments.scene_description: Having passed the stone tower, the camera moves through a wide open snow valley. The aurora borealis dominates the sky with vibrant green hues. Rocky mountain slopes frame both sides of the valley as the path continues upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain pass with converging rocky walls

agents.ego_description: climbing steadily through a narrowing mountain pass with rocky outcrops closing in on both sides

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peak visible at the end of the pass

segments.scene_description: The terrain narrows into a mountain pass with rocky cliffs drawing closer on both sides. The path continues ascending toward a distant snow-capped peak. The aurora remains visible overhead, casting an ethereal blue-green glow on the snow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins by trailing a traveler through an open snowy slope and gradually tightens into a narrow, towering mountain pass. It begins by following a character in white clothing past an ancient stone tower and a wooden marker post, with the aurora borealis glowing in the night sky above. As the character moves out of frame, the camera continues forward into a wide open snow valley where vibrant green hues of the aurora dominate the sky between rocky slopes. The scene then shifts as the terrain narrows, with rocky cliffs drawing closer on both sides to form a mountain pass. Finally, the camera ascends toward a distant snow-capped peak under an ethereal blue-green glow cast upon the snow.
